title: fix: persist youtube fixture cursor failure state
goal: Persist safe connector same-failure state on internal YouTube Live Chat fixture cursors and wire the app cursor gateway to the optional service hooks.
doneCriteria: internal fixture cursor can store safe connector failure state
invalid failure state returns safe 400 instead of raw error behavior
internal fixture cursor can clear connector failure state
AppCursorGateway persists same-failure state through service hooks
network-disabled E2E reaches same_failure_repeated across service runs without real network execution
no package, lockfile, real network, OAuth, secret, runtime readiness, production readiness, legal compliance, or YouTube policy compliance claim
token sale, token exchange, cash-out, custody, internal balance, and investment wording remain forbidden

No real YouTube API, OAuth token, token exchange, token refresh, token revocation request, RPC, wallet, or deploy change is used.
No runtime, production, legal, or YouTube policy readiness is claimed.

productVerificationCommands: corepack pnpm exec vitest run apps/api/src/p0-youtube-live-chat-fixture-cursor-boundary.test.ts apps/api/src/p1-youtube-live-chat-network-disabled-e2e.test.ts: pass

packageVerification.verification: No package scripts, runtime dependencies, DB driver dependency, Google SDK dependency, package.json, or pnpm-lock changes are introduced.

apiCompatibilitySummary.statement: Adds internal fixture cursor failure-state endpoints and app cursor gateway hooks for fake connector control; external public API shape is unchanged.

runtimeSmokeRationale: No runtime readiness is claimed; app.inject and fake_transport tests verify failure-state persistence without real network or OAuth.
rollbackOrStopCondition: Stop if package.json, pnpm-lock, contracts, migrations, workflows, apps/web, apps/overlay, real YouTube API, real OAuth, real network, real DB, DB driver dependency, Google SDK dependency, wallet/RPC/deploy changes, secret reads, or readiness/compliance claims are introduced.

reviewScope.scope: P1 internal fixture cursor failure-state persistence and network-disabled E2E hook wiring.
reviewScope.riskSummary: Main risk is repeated connector failures being forgotten when using app-backed cursor gateway; fix stores safe failure-state metadata on internal fixture cursor and clears it on success.
reviewScope.verificationOracle: Focused cursor boundary and network-disabled E2E tests, typecheck, full tests, evidence checks, quality self-protection, secret scan, and GitHub same-head checks.
